summary_en: 170,000 shares (0.55% of S/O) up to ¥500M via open-market purchase on TSE. Execution window: May 18–Aug 31, 2026. Stated rationale: capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on Articles of Incorporation per Companies Act Section 459(1))
translation_en_brief: Yamagata Bank's board resolved on 15 May 2026 to acquire up to 170,000 ordinary shares (0.55% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate limit of ¥500 million through open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The execution window runs from 18 May through 31 August 2026. The stated reason is to improve capital efficiency and return profits to shareholders. As of 31 March 2026, the bank held 1,209,642 treasury shares against 31,006,473 issued shares (excluding treasury).
